task: social recommendation (item recommendation with social relations)
input: user-item interaction graph and user-user social graph
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: graph convolutional network (GCN) for embedding propagation
loss: BPR loss (implicitly, from comparison with baselines using BPR)
key_idea: recursively propagate user embeddings along the social network to incorporate high-order social influence directly into the predictive model
